title: SIXsVCMute
description: Moderation plugin for Simple Voice Chat вЂ” mute, ban and IP-ban players from voice chat with temporary or permanent punishments, reasons, history log and full configuration support.
body:
# SIXsVCMute

**SIXsVCMute** is a moderation plugin for [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) that gives server staff full control over voice channel access вЂ” mute, ban, and IP-ban players directly from Voice Chat, with support for temporary and permanent punishments, reasons, and a complete history log.

---

## вњЁ Features

- рџ”‡ **VC Mute** вЂ” Silences a player in Voice Chat. They remain connected but can't be heard.
- рџљ« **VC Ban** вЂ” Kicks and blocks a player from connecting to Voice Chat entirely.
- рџЊђ **VC IP Ban** вЂ” Bans a player's IP from Voice Chat, blocking ban evasion attempts.
- вЏ±пёЏ **Temporary or Permanent Punishments** вЂ” Specify a duration (`30s`, `10m`, `2h`, `7d`, or combinations like `1h30m`) or leave it out for a permanent sanction.
- рџ“‹ **Reason Support** вЂ” Attach a reason to every punishment, shown to the target and logged in history.
- рџ“њ **Punishment History** вЂ” Full per-player history of all VC sanctions with `/vc history <player>`.
- рџ“Љ **Status & List** вЂ” Check a player's current VC status (`/vc player`) or list all active mutes/bans (`/vc list`).
- рџ”” **Admin Notifications** вЂ” Admins are notified when a muted/banned player joins the server.
- рџ’ѕ **Persistent Data** вЂ” All punishments survive server restarts.
- рџЋЁ **Fully Customizable Messages** вЂ” Every message is editable in `config.yml`, with full support for `&` color codes and hex colors (`&#RRGGBB`).
- рџ”Ѓ **Hot Reload** вЂ” Apply config changes live with `/vc reload`, no restart needed.

---

## рџ“¦ Requirements

- **Paper / Purpur** (API 1.21+)
- **[Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat)** (soft dependency вЂ” plugin loads without it, but VC features require it)

---

## рџ› пёЏ Commands

| Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/vcmute <player> [duration] [reason]` | Mute a player from VC |
| `/vcunmute <player>` | Remove a VC mute |
| `/vcban <player> [duration] [reason]` | Ban a player from VC |
| `/vcunban <player>` | Remove a VC ban |
| `/vcbanip <player> [duration] [reason]` | IP-ban a player from VC |
| `/vcunbanip <player\|ip>` | Remove a VC IP ban |
| `/vc help` | Show command list |
| `/vc status` | Show plugin status |
| `/vc player <player>` | Show a player's VC status |
| `/vc list` | List all active mutes and bans |
| `/vc history <player>` | Show sanction history for a player |
| `/vc reload` | Reload the configuration |

---

## рџ”ђ Permissions

| Permission | Description | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `vcmoderator.*` | All SIXsVCMute permissions | `false` |
| `vcmoderator.mute` | `/vcmute` and `/vcunmute` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.ban` | `/vcban` and `/vcunban` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.banip` | `/vcbanip` and `/vcunbanip` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.status` | `/vc status` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.list` | `/vc list` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.history` | `/vc history` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.reload` | `/vc reload` | `op` |
| `vcmoderator.bypass` | Cannot be muted or banned | `false` |

---

## вљ™пёЏ Configuration

All plugin messages are fully customizable in `config.yml`. Supports `&` color codes and hex colors (`&#RRGGBB`). Change the prefix, default reasons, and every single notification message to match your server's style.

---

рџђ› **Bug Reports & Support**

Got a bug? A question? Just want to know what's coming next? The **Discord server** is the place to be вЂ” support tickets, changelogs, announcements and more, all in one place.

рџ‘‰ **[Join the Discord](https://discord.gg/MB9vEdm22P)**

---

*Made by **SIXs** вЂ” built for 1.21+*
